_comment: Claude Desktop example for Oracle ADB Native MCP with bearer token. Duplicate one server block per target database. Keep the same tool contract (RUN_SQL, optional LIST_SCHEMAS) in every database.

graph-advisor-<db-alias-1>.description: Oracle Graph Advisor on ADB Native MCP for <db-alias-1>.

graph-advisor-<db-alias-2>.description: Oracle Graph Advisor on ADB Native MCP for <db-alias-2>.
